creator: ivan@drm.su
text:
Hi Kai,

Thanks for the reply.

Yes, I meant the official FreeBSD repo of the latest ports branch.

FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE amd64

When I posted the bug here I run:

❯ pkg search anki
aqbanking-6.5.4                Online banking interface and financial data framework
rubygem-aws-sdk-kendraranking-1.1.0 Official AWS Ruby gem for Amazon Kendra Intelligent Ranking (Kendra Ranking)

There was no anki package.

You also can observe this on https://www.freshports.org/games/anki
There is no package for FreeBSD:13:amd64 on "latest" branch.

Well, the strange behavior is not finished. Yesterday I did pkg update and run again:
❯ pkg search anki
anki-2.1.54_14                 Flashcard trainer with spaced repetition
aqbanking-6.5.4                Online banking interface and financial data framework
rubygem-aws-sdk-kendraranking-1.1.0 Official AWS Ruby gem for Amazon Kendra Intelligent Ranking (Kendra Ranking)

I have also successfully installed the package.

So, I thought you already fixed id, did you?
